Kissa-Approved Process

From Photo to Doorstep in 3 Steps

No design skills needed. Just bring your favourite cat photo — Kissa does the quality check.

1
📸

Upload Your Cat Photo

Share your favourite snap of your furball. Any pose, any vibe. The goofier the better — Kissa loves character.

Start uploading →
2
🎨

We Design Your Artwork

Our artists transform your cat into stunning custom artwork. Then Kissa inspects it personally before it ships.

See examples →
3
📦

Receive It at Your Door

Your merch ships fast, packed beautifully. Open it, love it, brag about it. Your cat will be so proud.

Track your order →
